---
title: "code_sanitizer.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\code_sanitizer.py"
loc: 411
complexity: 107
logic_score: 4.95
style_score: 3.85
intel_score: 6.75
overall_score: 2.62
---

## Intent
The `code_sanitizer.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on QuarantineFailure, BifrostGate, __init__, validate_syntax, _get_project_modules, _check_import_node, validate_imports, _can_import, repair_syntax, _find_bad_imports, _apply_mock_stubs, repair_imports, _is_valid_import, scan_and_enrich_imports, perform_quarantine_scan, neuter_qmd_document, heimdall_guard, sanitize_code, sanitize_test, _strip_markdown_fences, _fix_indentation, _deep_fix_indentation, _is_syntax_valid, _find_min_indent, _apply_indent_correction, classify_error, extract_error_summary. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via QuarantineFailure, BifrostGate, __init__, validate_syntax, _get_project_modules, _check_import_node, validate_imports, _can_import, repair_syntax, _find_bad_imports, _apply_mock_stubs, repair_imports, _is_valid_import, scan_and_enrich_imports, perform_quarantine_scan, neuter_qmd_document, heimdall_guard, sanitize_code, sanitize_test, _strip_markdown_fences, _fix_indentation, _deep_fix_indentation, _is_syntax_valid, _find_min_indent, _apply_indent_correction, classify_error, extract_error_summary. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 131 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [ast](file://ast)
- [importlib](file://importlib)
- [re](file://re)
- [textwrap](file://textwrap)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.tools.brave_search](file://src.tools.brave_search)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `QuarantineFailure`
- `BifrostGate`
- `__init__`
- `validate_syntax`
- `_get_project_modules`
- `_check_import_node`
- `validate_imports`
- `_can_import`
- `repair_syntax`
- `_find_bad_imports`
- `_apply_mock_stubs`
- `repair_imports`
- `_is_valid_import`
- `scan_and_enrich_imports`
- `perform_quarantine_scan`
- `neuter_qmd_document`
- `heimdall_guard`
- `sanitize_code`
- `sanitize_test`
- `_strip_markdown_fences`
- `_fix_indentation`
- `_deep_fix_indentation`
- `_is_syntax_valid`
- `_find_min_indent`
- `_apply_indent_correction`
- `classify_error`
- `extract_error_summary`
